🌍 {{ _('Trilingual translator 🇧🇷 🇺🇸 🇫🇷 + Anki') }}

{{ _('Turn words into learning') }}

{{ _('Translate words and expressions between French, English and Portuguese, save them to Anki and review later.') }}

{{ _('Supported languages') }}

  • {{ _('French → English + Portuguese') }}
  • {{ _('English → French + Portuguese') }}
  • {{ _('Portuguese → English + French') }}

{{ _('Create deck') }}

{{ _('Translate') }}

{{ _('Choose a deck manually or use Auto Detect.') }}

{{ _('This app only works with French, English and Portuguese.') }}

{% if translation_data and (translation_data.translations or translation_data.explanation_data or translation_data.detected_language) %}

🚀 {{ _('Result') }}

{% if translation_data.detected_language %}
{{ _('Detected language') }}
{{ translation_data.detected_language }}
{% endif %} {% if selected_deck and selected_deck != "Auto Detect" %}
{{ _('Deck used') }}
{{ selected_deck }}
{% endif %} {% if translation_data.has_audio %}
🔊 {{ _('Audio') }}
{{ _('Generated') }}
{% endif %}
{% if translation_data.translations %}
{% for item in translation_data.translations %}

{{ item.label }}

{{ item.text }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

📖 {{ _('Explanation and examples') }}

{% if translation_data.explanation_data %} {% if translation_data.explanation_data.definitions %}
{% for item in translation_data.explanation_data.definitions %}
{% if item.number %} {{ item.number }} {% endif %} {{ item.text }}
{% if item.examples %}
🔹 {{ _('Examples') }}
    {% for ex in item.examples %}
  • {{ ex }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if item.synonyms %}
🔹 {{ _('Synonyms') }}

{{ item.synonyms | join(', ') }}

{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if translation_data.explanation_data.locutions %}

💡 {{ _('Expressions / Locutions') }}

{% for loc in translation_data.explanation_data.locutions %}
{{ loc.title }}

{{ loc.text }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if translation_data.explanation_data.corpus_examples %}

📚 {{ _('Example Phrases') }}

{% for ex in translation_data.explanation_data.corpus_examples %}
"{{ ex }}"
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if not translation_data.explanation_data.definitions and not translation_data.explanation_data.corpus_examples and translation_data.explanation_data.fallback_text %}

{{ translation_data.explanation_data.fallback_text }}

{% endif %} {% else %}

{% endif %}
